query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS multas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresaId INT NOT NULL,
  veiculoId INT NOT NULL,
  motoristaId INT,
  data DATE NOT NULL,
  local VARCHAR(255),
  descricao TEXT NOT NULL,
  numeroAuto VARCHAR(50),
  pontos INT DEFAULT 0,
  valor DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  vencimento DATE,
  status ENUM('pendente','pago','recorrido','cancelado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  responsavel ENUM('motorista','empresa') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'motorista',
  observacoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW() NOT NULL,
  deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deletedBy INT NULL,
  deleteReason TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS multas (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  empresaId INT NOT NULL,
  veiculoId INT NOT NULL,
  motoristaId INT,
  data DATE NOT NULL,
  local VARCHAR(255),
  descricao TEXT NOT NULL,
  numeroAuto VARCHAR(50),
  pontos INT DEFAULT 0,
  valor DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  vencimento DATE,
  status ENUM('pendente','pago','recorrido','cancelado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  responsavel ENUM('motorista','empresa') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'motorista',
  observacoes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW() NOT NULL,
  deletedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  deletedBy INT NULL,
  deleteReason TEXT NULL
);
